race.comment: THE DEPUTY (1) found the line nicely, narrowly beaten over 1300m at this track. Just missed the two before and has a handy 2kg claim in coming back in grade. Draws an inside gate and can go one better. CHINCHILLA AHEAD (3) resumed here over 1000m with strong market support, beaten 2 lengths after being prominent at the bend. Has switched stables since and the longer sprint suits. Has won 2/3 second-up, and the 3kg claimer is likely to skip over from the awkward gate. Will go close with average luck. KAREEM (2) is better than the recent form suggests. Better placed in this grade, but she's a get-back type and from the inside gate, will need the splits to come. BARCELONA EXPRESS (5) resumed at Coffs Harbour in good order and has more to give stepping up in trip. Maps for the run of the race and the 2kg claim is handy. TOBA (6) draws wide but will be around the mark, forgiving the latest in tougher.
